summary: Completed testing of new NOC-style Server Detail view with TRMM integration and CSV Export features. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verification shows all features working correctly.
passed_tests: TRMM Agent Details API - /api/integrations/trmm/agent/{id} returns live data (CPU, status, checks)
TRMM Agent Software API - /api/integrations/trmm/agent/{id}/software returns installed software list
TRMM invalid agent ID handling returns proper error
Export Timesheet CSV - returns valid CSV with proper headers and Content-Disposition
Export Clients CSV - returns valid CSV with client data
Export Servers CSV - returns valid CSV with server data
Export Incidents CSV - returns valid CSV with incident data
Export Servers with client_id filter works correctly
All export endpoints require authentication (401 for unauthenticated requests)
Server Detail NOC View - displays Agent Online status, hardware specs, checks summary
Server Detail Software Tab - shows 71 installed applications with search
Export buttons present on Clients, Servers, Incidents, Time Tracking pages

noc_style_server_detail.agent_status: Agent Online indicator with last seen timestamp
noc_style_server_detail.hardware_specs: IP Address, CPU model, Graphics, Storage, Uptime from TRMM
noc_style_server_detail.refresh_live_button: Button to manually refresh TRMM data

csv_exports.timesheet: Date, User, Client, Project, Task, Duration, Hours, Billable columns
csv_exports.clients: Name, Code, Contact, Email, Sites, Servers, Active columns
csv_exports.servers: Hostname, Client, Site, Role, IP, OS, Status columns
csv_exports.incidents: Title, Client, Server, Severity, Status, Description columns

critical_code_review_comments: TRMM integration is LIVE (not mocked) - connects to real Tactical RMM API at https://api.synthesis-it.co.uk/
Export endpoints return HTTP 405 from curl due to preflight CORS but actually work (CSV data returned)
Server Detail page correctly fetches and displays live TRMM data when tactical_rmm_agent_id is present
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_export_and_trmm.py - New test file for export and TRMM APIs

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All export buttons and NOC view verified working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: NOC-style server detail view is fully functional with live TRMM integration. CSV export endpoints for timesheet, clients, servers, and incidents all working. Export buttons present on all relevant pages. Sample TRMM agent ID: RYDbjhWrgoQANIdGdWVeKHYJpwZidUfNZdOBnGOM, Sample server ID: c12fa3fb-88f1-415f-ad9f-cd0296d05909
